executive_summary: The system successfully integrated core operational rules and confidence-based governance. The primary external stressor (lawyer payment pressure) has been analyzed and contained. System architecture is currently in ELEVATED mode, focusing on stabilization and boundary enforcement rather than escalation.

system_health.emotional_load: Stabilized but monitoring. The user is managing financial pressure but adhering to structured tasks rather than emotional reactions.

recommended_priorities: Priority 1 (Legal): Execute task_1_review_agreement to establish objective facts.
Priority 2 (Legal): Execute task_3_draft_response to set the boundary.
